title: Low Ones
content:
{{Top|leg}}
The "'''Low Ones'''" were [[Force-sensitive/Legends|Force-sensitive]] members of the [[Yrashu]] [[Species/Legends|species]], who were tainted by the [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|Dark side of the Force]]. They were tolerated by the Yrashu, but looked down upon as delinquent and deviant individuals. It was the only class distinction in the Yrashu culture. Before the [[Battle of Baskarn]] a group of [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] ran into a band of Low ones who had taken the [[Blaster/Legends|blasters]] belonging to a Rebel recon group from the [[Advance Base Baskarn]], who had been eaten by a large predatory flightless bird. The Rebels easily defeated the Low Ones and were accepted into a friendly tribe of Yrashu who had been harassed by the blaster-armed Low Ones.

==Appearances==
